gaps.title: Sentiment Score Boundary Failures
gaps.breaks: Incorrect classification at critical thresholds (60, 80) causing wrong escalation/routing
gaps.scenario: Customer message scores exactly 59.9999 but gets routed as VIP instead of regular, or scores 60.001 but doesn't trigger escalation
gaps.prompt: Write unit tests for the sentiment analysis engine that test boundary conditions at critical thresholds (59.9, 60, 60.1, 79.9, 80, 80.1, 39.9, 40, 40.1, 69.9, 70, 70.1, 89.9, 90, 90.1). Include edge cases with mixed emotions, sarcasm, and culturally ambiguous language that might cause misclassification.

gaps.title: RAG Tenant Isolation Leak
gaps.breaks: One customer retrieves another tenant's knowledge base documents
gaps.scenario: Tenant A searches for "refund policy" and gets results from Tenant B's private knowledge base due to incorrect vector similarity filtering
gaps.prompt: Write integration tests for the RAG retrieval system that specifically test tenant isolation. Create multiple tenants with overlapping content, then verify that search results only contain documents from the correct tenant. Test with edge cases like similar document titles, shared industry terms, and documents with similar content but different tenants.

gaps.title: Re-Indexing Race Condition
gaps.breaks: Inconsistent vector embeddings when documents are updated during re-indexing
gaps.scenario: Support agent updates a KB document while re-indexing is in progress, causing some searches to return the old version while others return the new version
gaps.prompt: Write stress tests that simulate concurrent document updates and re-indexing operations. Test scenarios where multiple documents are updated simultaneously, and where updates happen during different phases of the re-indexing process. Verify that the final state is consistent and that no partial updates are visible to users.

gaps.title: Cache Staleness During Re-Indexing
gaps.breaks: Users see outdated search results until cache expires naturally
gaps.scenario: KB document is updated and re-indexed, but search results still show old content until the cache TTL expires
gaps.prompt: Write integration tests that verify cache invalidation happens immediately after document updates and re-indexing. Test scenarios where documents are updated multiple times in quick succession, and verify that the cache is properly invalidated and updated each time. Include tests for the Redis cache specifically.

gaps.title: Sentiment-Technique Override Conflicts
gaps.breaks: Incorrect technique selection when sentiment scores fall between ranges
gaps.scenario: Customer message scores 0.29 (should be UoT+Step-Back) but system only applies Step-Back due to incorrect boundary handling
gaps.prompt: Write unit tests for the sentiment-technique mapping system that test boundary conditions at all range thresholds (0.29, 0.3, 0.31, 0.49, 0.5, 0.51). Test edge cases where multiple techniques could apply and verify that the correct priority-based selection is made. Include tests for VIP overrides and special handling cases.

gaps.title: Vector Search Similarity Threshold Edge Cases
gaps.breaks: Documents with very high similarity but slightly below threshold are excluded incorrectly
gaps.scenario: A highly relevant document with similarity score 0.749 is excluded when threshold is 0.75, causing poor search results
gaps.prompt: Write integration tests for the vector search system that test behavior at the similarity threshold boundary. Test with documents that have similarity scores just below, at, and just above the threshold. Verify that the top-k retrieval works correctly when documents are very close to the threshold. Test with various tenant configurations (Mini, Parwa, High) to ensure consistent behavior.
